title: Easy DIY Photo Canvas Project
excerpt: Loving this little corner of our living room. The chair and credenza are vintage and pillow, succulents an photo canvases are new. Snapfish sponsored this video and the 11x14 canvases are on sale for just $19.99 on Snapfish - USE…
body:
Loving this little corner of our living room. The chair and credenza are vintage and pillow, succulents an photo canvases are new. Snapfish sponsored this video and the 11x14 canvases are on sale for just $19.99 on Snapfish - USE CODE CANVAS1999 THROUGH 3/31.

I also used the canvases before putting the American Crafts Thick & Thin Thickers on at the Marilyn Denis Show. You can see the full segment here.
